title: Lung COVID

pulmonary sequalae after COVID-19 in CKD patientssuch as oxygen requirement,ventilator need and levels of inflammatory

and C-reactive protein (CRP)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7vt9d","text":"

","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"24v3i","text":"The study was conducted according to the Declaration of Helsinki and Good Clinical
Practice guidelines, and all study methods were carried out in accordance with
relevant guidelines and regulations. All patients participating in the study
signed an informed consent before enrollment.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c7get","text":"
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6tgqb","text":"14. Expected outcomes of the study","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":34}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f1i36","text":"
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7c7r","text":"This trial contribute to new knowledge, including the
consequences of the most affected organ (lung) after COVID-19, which has rarely
been reported previously. In addition, the factors that associated with poor
pulmonary outcome will also be considered. ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7idib","text":"

The participants will have minimal effects from the
measurements performed in this study.The anticipated side effects from radiation
or pulmonary function testss will be closely monitored
